NITK Surathkal – Admission, Cutoff, Fees & Placements 2026

Engineering Colleges, NIT Colleges

Overview

Institute NameNational Institute of Technology Karnataka, Surathkal
Also Known AsNITK
Institute TypeGovernment
Established1960
LocationMangalore, Karnataka

NIT Surathkal: Admission | Ranking | Fees

Also Known as

Also known as NIT Karnataka, NIT Surathkal, NIT Mangalore and NITK.

ADDRESS

National Institute of Technology Karnataka, Srinivasnagar PO, Surathkal, Mangalore, Karnataka - 575025

Nearest Airport and Railway Station

Mangalore International Airport
19 km
Surathkal Railway Station
5 km
Mangalore Central Railway Station
19 km
Mangalore Junction Railway Station
20 km

CAMPUS FACILITIES

RANKING

BodyCategoryRank (Year)
LatestPrevious
International Ranking
QS Asia University Rankings443 (2026)441-450 (2025)
QS World Subject Rankings - Mechanical, Aeronautical & Manufacturing451-500 (2025)--
National Ranking
NIRF Overall Rankings54 (2025)46 (2024)
NIRF Engineering Rankings17 (2025)17 (2024)
NIRF Research Rankings42 (2024)41 (2023)
NIRF Innovation Rankings151-300 (2023)--
Outlook India's Top Govt. Engineering Colleges8 (2025)8 (2024)
The Week Best Technical Universities India10 (2023)--
The Week Top Engineering Colleges India13 (2024)13 (2023)

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must appear for the JEE (Main) exam and either secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Main Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Main) through JoSAA Counselling and CSAB Special Round.

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Artificial Intelligence
  • Chemical Engineering
  • Civil Engineering
  • Computational and Data Science
  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Electrical and Electronics Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering
  • Information Technology
  • Mechanical Engineering
  • Metallurgical and Materials Engineering
  • Mining Engineering

FEE STRUCTURE

Institute Fee

ParticularsAmount
Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹6,390
One-Time Fees₹9,990
Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹62,500
Other Fees (per Semester)₹2,560
Annual Fees₹15,430
Total₹96,870

Hostel Fee

ParticularsAmount
One-Time Fees₹1,000
Hostel Charges (per Semester)₹8,400
Other Fees (per Semester)₹11,790
Annual Fees₹520
Mess Advance (per Semester)₹22,000
Total₹43,710

Fee Waivers

  • 100% Tuition Fee waiver for SC/ST/PwD students.
  • 100% Tuition Fee remission for Most Economically Backward students with family income less than ₹1 lakh per annum.
  • 2/3rd Tuition Fee remission for Other Economically Backward students with family income between ₹1 lakh to ₹5 lakh per annum.

Placements

  • 2024
  • Older

Highlights

  • 5 students received offers from Palo Alto Networks
  • 9 students received offers from Microsoft
  • 2 students received offers from D.E. Shaw & Co
  • 3 students received offers from Intuit
  • 1 student received an offer from Salesforce
